parameters.query:
WITH price_agg AS (
  SELECT p.item_external_id,
    jsonb_agg(jsonb_build_object(
      'terminal', t.name, 'buy', p.buy_price, 'sell', p.sell_price
    ) ORDER BY t.name) AS uex_prices
  FROM prices p
  JOIN trade_terminals t ON t.id = p.terminal_id
  WHERE GREATEST(COALESCE(p.buy_price, 0), COALESCE(p.sell_price, 0)) > 0
  GROUP BY p.item_external_id
),
shop_agg AS (
  SELECT si.item_raw_id,
    jsonb_agg(jsonb_build_object(
      'shop', si.shop, 'location', si.location,
      'buy', si.buy_auec, 'sell', si.sell_auec
    ) ORDER BY si.shop) AS datap4k_prices
  FROM datap4k_shop_inventory si
  WHERE si.item_raw_table = 'datap4k_components_raw'
    AND GREATEST(COALESCE(si.buy_auec, 0), COALESCE(si.sell_auec, 0)) > 0
  GROUP BY si.item_raw_id
)
SELECT
  cn.id, cn.raw_id, cn.class, cn.name,
  cn.type, cn.sub_type, cn.size, cn.grade,
  cn.manufacturer, cn.manufacturer_code,
  cn.stats,
  cn.uex_id, cn.uex_category_name, cn.uex_category_section,
  cn.slug, cn.source_slug,
  COALESCE(pa.uex_prices,  '[]'::jsonb) AS uex_prices,
  COALESCE(sa.datap4k_prices, '[]'::jsonb) AS datap4k_prices
FROM datap4k_components_norm cn
LEFT JOIN price_agg pa ON pa.item_external_id = cn.uex_id AND cn.uex_id IS NOT NULL
LEFT JOIN shop_agg  sa ON sa.item_raw_id = cn.raw_id
WHERE cn.id = {{ $json.id }};
